# name_from_id (Function)

Given an ID string value, returns the name contained in the ID.

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
name_from_id(id string) string
```

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `id` (String) id to extract the name from
